name: Superchat
highlight_text: Best suited for: Small-mid Business, Entreprises
description:
What Superchat Does

Superchat is mainly a chat automation software that allows businesses to communicate with customers on preferred channels. But it also provides tools to generate, monitor, and manage online reviews from customers. The review management component integrates with Superchat's broader business automation suite. The core value prop is making it easy to systematically collect customer feedback on third-party review sites while maintaining visibility into all incoming reviews.

Source: Superchat.com

Key Features

  • Send review request invitations to customers via their preferred communication channels
  • Create custom review links to direct customers to leave feedback on specific sites
  • Ability to use templated messages when requesting reviews
  • Centralized dashboard to view new reviews from integrated platforms like Google, ProvenExpert, Trustpilot, etc.
  • Notifications about incoming reviews from important sources
  • At-a-glance tracking of review volumes and progress

Pricing

$169 per month

Pros

✅Platform allows review collection through highly personalized channels

✅Has option to respond to reviews from within its chatbox

Cons

❌Platform doesn’t have review management capabilities for many major sites

❌Review management may not be available as a separate service and features are highly limited

❌Onboarding is slow and can take significant time
what_people_say:
‍

What customers say

“Superchat gives us the possibilty to inform our customers in a quick and efficient way. The customer recieves news in an familiar surface (WhatsApp). Customers can also replay and react to messages. Questions can be asked at any time and we are able to anwer them.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com

‍

“We did not enjoy the set-up process. It seemed that we were some sort of special case and we waited up to 3 weeks before we were able to send the first message.”

- Review collected by and hosted on G2.com
